whakamārama.pūrere: Me pūrere hototahi ki te eSIM, kua wetewete. Ka rerekē te wātea i runga i te tauira waea, te kaiwhakarato, me te whenua. Ka rerekē te taupiringa me te tere i ia rohe.

whānau.taitara-iti: Tiritiria tētahi puna raraunga kotahi puta noa i tō whānau. Kotahi te pire, maha ngā pūkete Chatforia, kapi ā-ao.

small.title: Whānau Iti
small.desc: Kei roto he 20 GB o raraunga tere-nui hei tiritiri — he pai mō ngā kaiwhakamahi māmā e rua ki te toru.

medium.title: Whānau Waenga

large.title: Whānau Nui
large.desc: Kei roto he 80 GB raraunga tere-nui hei tiritiri — mō ngā whānau kaha e hono ana i ngā wā katoa.

whānau.disclaimer: Ka waihanga, ka whakakī rānei ngā pākete whānau i tētahi puna raraunga tiritahi. Ka taea e koe te tono me te tango i ngā mema i ngā wā katoa.
whānau.tāpiri kōrero: Ka tohatoha ngā pākete whānau i tētahi puna raraunga kotahi puta noa i ngā pūkete Chatforia kua honoa. Ka whakawhirinaki te wātea me ngā here ki tō whenua me ngā ture ā-rohe.

he aha.taitara: He aha e huri ana ngā tāngata ki Chatforia
he aha.taitara-iti: Ka hoatu e Chatforia he nama waea tūturu, he whakamāoritanga atamai, me tētahi huarahi mārama kia kore ai e whai pānui ina kua rite koe.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Ngā pānui māmā ake i runga i te Kōtaha Koreutu, he whakahōu Plus māmā ina rite koe, me ngā taputapu Premium kāore e tukuna e TextNow.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Taupānga hou, ā-ao -hoahoa tuatahi, me te whakamāori ā-roto hei utu mō te tuku karanga tawhito.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs ngā taupānga kōrerorero
messengers.body: Tukuna ngā nama waea tūturu — ehara i te mea ki ētahi atu kaiwhakamahi taupānga anake — me te AI me te tūnga kua whakaurua. He pai rawa atu mēnā kei te haere mai koe i ngā taupānga pērā i a TextFree, TextMe rānei.

he aha.tableTitle: Me pēhea te whakataurite a Chatforia

hītori.textnow: Ka rerekē i runga i te pūkete
hītori.voice: Herenga / i runga i te pūkete

he aha.disclaimer: Ko te whakataurite i runga i ngā pārongo e wātea ana ki te marea, ā, ka huri pea i te wā. He rite whānui ngā taupānga karere kuputuhi kore utu pērā i a TextFree, TextMe rānei ki a TextNow.

faq.title: Ngā Utu me ngā Mahere FAQ

free.q: He kore utu tūturu te mahere Kore Utu?
free.a: Ae. Kei roto i te mahere Kore Utu he nama Chatforia, he karanga, me te tuku karere me ngā pānui. Ka taea e koe te noho ki te mahere Kore Utu mō te wā e hiahia ana koe, ka whakahōu rānei kia tangohia ngā pānui, kia whakatuwherahia hoki ētahi atu āhuatanga.

plusPremium.q: He aha te rerekētanga i waenga i te Plus me te Premium?
plusPremium.a: Ka tango a Plus i ngā pānui, ā, ka whakawhānui i tō hītori karere — he tino pai mō te whakamahinga o ia rā. Ka tāpiri a Premium i ētahi atu whakaritenga, ngā taputapu AI mō te tuhi anō me ngā whakautu, me te tautoko matua mō ngā kaiwhakamahi nui.

esim.q: Kei hea e mahi ai ngā pākete raraunga eSIM?
esim.a: Ka whakamahi a Chatforia Mobile i te taupoki eSIM ā-ao. Ka whakawhirinaki te wātea ki tō whenua me tō pūrere. Ka kite koe i ngā kōwhiringa tautokona i te wā whakahohe i roto i te taupānga.

whakakore.q: Ka taea e au te whakakore, te whakarereke rānei i ngā mahere i ngā wā katoa?
whakakore.a: Āe. Ka taea e koe te whakahaere, te whakakore rānei i tō ohaurunga mai i te whārangi utu i roto i te taupānga. Ka whai mana ngā panoni i te mutunga o tō wā utu o nāianei.

whānau.q: Me pēhea te mahi a ngā Pākete Whānau?
whānau.a: Ka waihanga ngā Pākete Whānau i tētahi puna raraunga tiritahi puta noa i ngā pūkete Chatforia maha. Kotahi te tangata e utu ana i te pire, ā, ka taea e koe te tono, te tango rānei i ngā mema, me te whakarite here mō ia tangata.

account.q: Me pēhea taku hanga, te whakahoki rānei i taku pūkete?

privacy.q: Kua whakamunatia ngā karere mai i te tīmatanga ki te mutunga?
privacy.a: Ae. Ka whakamunatia ngā karere me ngā waea mai i te tīmatanga ki te mutunga hei taunoa. Ko koe anake me te kaiwhiwhi e taea te pānui i ēnei.

translate.q: Me pēhea te mahi a te whakamāori ohorere?
translate.a: Whakahohe i te "Auto-translate" i ngā Tautuhinga → Ahua & Reo. Ka whakamāoritia e mātou i runga i te pūrere mēnā ka tautokona, ki te kore, mā ngā API haumaru me ngā raraunga iti rawa.

contact.a: Whakapā mai ki a mātou i support@chatforia.com. Tēnā, whakauruhia ngā whakaahua mata me tō putanga taupānga.

gettingStarted.title: Tīmatanga
gettingStarted.subtitle: He hou koe ki Chatforia? E whakaatu ana tēnei aratohu tere i ngā mea matua kia taea ai e koe te whai hua i roto i ngā meneti.

alert.text: Ka tipu haere tēnei aratohu i a mātou e whakarewa ana i ngā āhuatanga hou. Mēnā he mea kei te ngaro, whakamōhio mai mā

section1.title: 1) Waihangahia tō pūkete
section1.prefsStart: I roto i te taupānga, whakatuwherahia ngā Tautuhinga kia tautuhia ō manakohanga

section2.title: 2) Tīmatahia te karere
section2.item1: Waihangahia he DM, he Rōpū rānei, ā, tukuna tō karere tuatahi.
section2.item2: Whakamahia te whakamāori ohorere hei kōrero puta noa i ngā reo neke atu i te 100.
section2.item3: Whakamātauria ngā karere e ngaro ana me ngā rīpiti pānui i te Kōtaha → Tūmataitinga.

section3.title: 3) Haere whakamua
section3.item1: Ka taea e koe te whakahou ki tētahi mahere utu i ngā wā katoa i roto i te taupānga.
section3.item2: Kia takiuru koe, ka taea e koe te hono i ētahi atu pūrere me te whakarite i ngā tārua haumaru kua whakamunatia mai i ngā Tautuhinga i roto i te taupānga.
section3.item2Part1: Kia takiuru koe, ka taea e koe te hono i ētahi atu pūrere me te whakarite tārua haumaru mai i ngā Tautuhinga o te taupānga.

cta.seePlans: Tirohia ngā mahere me ngā utu

howItWorks.title: Me pēhea te mahi a Chatforia
howItWorks.intro: I hangaia a Chatforia kia māmā, kia tere, kia wātea hoki te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero. He torutoru noa ngā hipanga hei tīmata.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Rēhita mā tō īmēra, tō ingoa kaiwhakamahi rānei hei waihanga i tō pūkete Chatforia.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Hono atu ki ētahi atu mā te kōwhiri i ngā hononga, te tīmata rānei i ngā kōrero hou.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Ka tukuna wawe ngā karere kia māmā ai te wheako whakawhiti kōrero.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Ka āwhina te whakamāori kua whakaurua ki ngā kaiwhakamahi ki te whakawhiti kōrero puta noa i ngā reo rerekē.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Whakahaere i ō manakohanga, ō hononga, me ō tautuhinga whakawhitiwhiti kōrero.

haumaru.taitara: Ngā Tohutohu Haumaru me te Hapori
haumaru.whakataki: Kei te ū a Chatforia ki te pupuri i tētahi taiao haumaru, manaaki hoki mō ngā kaiwhakamahi katoa. Ka āwhina ēnei tohutohu ki te whakarite i tētahi wheako pai mō te katoa.
haumaru.respectDesc: E tūmanakohia ana kia whakawhitiwhiti kōrero ngā kaiwhakamahi i runga i te whakaute. Kāore e whakaaetia te whakatumatuma, te tukino, te whanonga kino rānei.

prohibited.explicit: Ngā rauemi mārama rānei he kino

tools.report: Tukua pūrongo mō ngā whanonga, ngā ihirangi rānei kāore e tika ana
tools.block: Aukati i ngā kaiwhakamahi kia kore ai e taea te whakawhiti kōrero anō
tools.control: Whakahaere i ngā tautuhinga tūmataiti me te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero

haumaru.enforcementDesc: Ka taea e mātou te whakahaere i ngā mahi ki ngā pūkete e takahi ana i ēnei aratohu, tae atu ki ngā whakatūpato, ngā here, te tango tūturu rānei i te papanga.

whyMessaging.title: He aha ai e tino hira ake ai ngā papa karere i ngā wā katoa
whyMessaging.intro: Kua noho ngā papa karere hei kotahi o ngā taputapu tino hira mō te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero i te ao o nāianei. Mai i ngā kōrero whaiaro ki ngā whakawhitinga pakihi, ka āhei ngā taupānga karere i te tangata kia hono tonu, kia whai hua hoki.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Ka whakawhirinaki te tangata ki ngā taupānga karere mō te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero ia rā ki ngā hoa, ki te whānau, ki ngā hoa mahi rānei. Ahakoa he whakahou tere, he kōrero roa rānei, ka whakarato te karere i tētahi huarahi māmā, ngawari hoki hei noho pūhonohono.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Ko tētahi o ngā painga matua o ngā papa karere ko tō rātou tere. Ka tukuna tonu ngā karere, ā, ka taea e ngā kaiwhakamahi te whakawhiti kōrero i te wā tūturu. Nā tēnei taumata ngāwari i riro ai te karere hei tikanga whakawhiti kōrero e tino manakohia ana e te tokomaha.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Ka hono ngā papanga karere i ngā tāngata puta noa i te ao. Mā te whai hononga ipurangi, ka taea e ngā kaiwhakamahi te whakawhiti kōrero ahakoa te wāhi, ā, ka māmā ake te hanga hononga me te mahi ngātahi ā-ao.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: E aro ana ngā papa karere o nāianei ki te tuku mana ki ngā kaiwhakamahi ki ā rātou raraunga me ā rātou kōrero. Mā ngā āhuatanga pērā i te whakamunatanga, ngā tautuhinga tūmataiti, me ngā whakahaere karere ka taea e ngā kaiwhakamahi te whakawhiti kōrero me te māia.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Kei te whanake tonu ngā karere me ngā āhuatanga hou pērā i ngā whakautu mā te AI, te whakamāori, me te tiri pāpāho maha. I te ahunga whakamua o te hangarau, ka kaha ake, ka whānui ake hoki ngā papa karere.
whyMessaging.outro: I hangaia a Chatforia me ēnei mātāpono i te hinengaro, e tuku ana i tētahi wheako karere tere, haumaru, me te wheako karere e ngāwari ana ki te kaiwhakamahi mō te ao hono.

global.title: Te Anamata o te Whakawhitiwhiti Kōrero ā-Ao
global.intro: Kua tere te whanaketanga o te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero i roto i ngā tekau tau kua pahure. I mua, me waea, me hui ā-kanohi rānei, engari ināianei ka taea ngā hui ā-kanohi-ki-te-kanohi -ka taea ināianei ngā hui ā-tangata e toru te tere mā ngā papanga karere. I te haere tonu o te hangarau, kei te tere ake, kei te wātea ake, kei te whānui ake hoki te whakawhiti kōrero ā-ao.
global.whakaahuatanga-whakawhē: Ko tētahi o ngā panonitanga nui rawa atu i te whakawhiti kōrero ko te whakaiti i ngā ārai ā-takiwā. Ka taea e te tangata ināianei te hono atu ki ētahi atu puta noa i te ao i te wā tata tonu. Ahakoa mō ngā kōrero whaiaro, mō ngā pakihi, mō te mahi tahi rānei, kua whakaiti rawa ngā papanga karere i te aukatinga o te tawhiti .
global.translationTitle: Te Tūranga o te Hangarau Whakamāori
global.translationDesc: Ko te reo i ngā wā o mua tētahi o ngā ārai nui rawa atu ki te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero ā-ao. I tēnei rā, ka āwhina ngā taputapu whakamāori kua whakaurua ki roto i ngā pūnaha ki te whakakī i taua āputa. Ka āhei ngā papa pērā i a Chatforia i ngā kaiwhakamahi ki te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero māmā ake ahakoa he reo rerekē ā rātou, ā, ka waihanga i ngā huarahi hou mō te hononga me te mārama.
global.privacyDesc: Ko te tere tētahi āhuatanga matua e āhua ana i te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero o nāianei. E tūmanako ana ngā kaiwhakamahi kia tukuna wawe ngā karere, ā, ka tautoko tēnei tūmanako e ngā hanganga o nāianei. Mā te karere tūturu ka taea ngā kōrero tūturu, ngāwari hoki.

I te mea ka nui ake te āhua matihiko o te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero, ka tino hira ake te tūmataitinga me te haumaru. E hiahia ana ngā kaiwhakamahi kia mārama kei te tiakina ā rātou kōrero. Ko ngā āhuatanga pērā i te whakamunatanga me ngā tautuhinga e whakahaerehia ana e te kaiwhakamahi hei tautoko i tētahi wheako whakawhitiwhiti kōrero haumaru ake.
global.futureTitle: He aha ngā mea e whai ake nei
global.futureDesc: Ko te anamata o te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero ā-ao ka whai pea i ngā taputapu matatau ake, pērā i ngā karere āwhina AI, te whakamāoritanga kua pai ake, me ngā wheako kaiwhakamahi kua whakarei ake. I te whanaketanga haere o te hangarau, ka haere tonu te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero kia māmā ake te whakamahi, kia wātea hoki.
global.outro: Ko ngā papa pērā i a Chatforia he wāhanga o tēnei panoni, e āwhina ana i te tangata kia hono ngāwari ake puta noa i ngā reo me ngā rohe.

index.title: Blog a Chatforia
index.intro: Tūhuratia ngā mōhiotanga mō te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero, te haumaru ipurangi, me te āhua e hono ana te hangarau karere i ngā tāngata puta noa i te ao.
index.post1: Me Pēhea te Kōrero Haumaru Ipurangi
index.post2: Te Anamata o te Whakawhitiwhiti Kōrero ā-Ao
index.post3: He aha te Take o ngā Papanga Karere

chatSafely.title: Me Pēhea te Kōrero Haumaru Ipurangi
chatSafely.intro: Kua māmā ake te whakawhiti kōrero ipurangi i ngā wā katoa ki te hono atu ki ngā tāngata puta noa i te ao. Ahakoa kei te tuku karere koe ki ō hoa, kei te tūtaki ki ngā tāngata hou, kei te mahi ngātahi rānei i ngā mahi ngaio, he wāhanga nui ngā papa karere i tō oranga o ia rā. Heoi, he mea nui kia noho haumaru ipurangi, kia mau tonu hoki te hononga.

personalInfo.title: Tiakina ō Mōhiohio Whaiaro
personalInfo.body: Ko tētahi o ngā ture tino hira mō te haumaru ipurangi, ko te karo i te tuku i ngā mōhiohio whaiaro matatini. Kei roto i ēnei tō wāhitau kāinga, ngā taipitopito pūtea, ngā kupuhipa, me ētahi atu mōhiohio tautuhi ka taea te whakamahia hē. Ahakoa i ngā kōrero noa, he pai ake kia tūpato koe ki ngā mea e tukuna ana e koe, me te tangata e tukuna ana."

āhuatangaHaumaru.taitara: Whakamahia ngā Āhuatanga Haumaru Kua Whakaurua
āhuatangaHaumaru.tinana: Ka whakarato ngā papanga karere hou pērā i a Chatforia i ngā taputapu hei āwhina i ngā kaiwhakamahi kia noho haumaru. Ko ngā āhuatanga pērā i te aukati, te pūrongo, me ngā whakahaere tūmataiti he mea hoahoa hei tuku mana ki ngā kaiwhakamahi mō tō rātou wheako. Mēnā ka whanonga hē tētahi, ka whakararuraru rānei i a koe, me whakamahi wawe koe i ēnei taputapu.

ngā Tinihanga.tinana: He maha ngā wā ka whakamahi ngā kaiwhakawhiti kōrero i ngā papa pāpāho karere hei whakapohehe i ngā kaiwhakamahi kia tuku i ō rātou pārongo whaiaro, kia tuku moni rānei. Kia tūpato ki ngā karere e tino pai rawa atu ana kia pono, pērā i ngā tuku ohorere, ngā tono ohorere, ngā hononga kāore i te mōhiotia. Me whakamana tonu ko wai te tangata e kōrero ana koe i mua i te mahi i tētahi mea.

responsibly.title: Whakawhitiwhiti Kōrero Whai Haepapa
responsibly.body: Ka āwhina te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero whakaute ki te waihanga i tētahi taiao haumaru ake mō te katoa. Kaua e uru ki ngā kōrero kino, whakaraerae rānei, ā, kia āta whakaaro ki te pānga o ō kupu ki ētahi atu. Ka whai wāhi ngā whakawhitinga whai hua ki te whakapai ake i te wheako mō ngā kaiwhakamahi katoa.

whySafety.title: He aha te take o te Haumaru Ipurangi
whySafety.body: I te tipu haere tonu o te whakawhitiwhiti matihiko, te pupuri te haumaru me te whakawhirinaki ka tino hira ake. Mā te whai i ngā tikanga haumaru taketake me te whakamahi i ngā taputapu e wātea ana, ka taea e ngā kaiwhakamahi te pārekareka ki ngā painga o te tuku karere, ā, ka whakaiti i ngā tūraru.

personalInfo.whakakapi: Kāore e hiahiatia ana he mātauranga hangarau matatau kia noho haumaru i te ipurangi—me mōhio, me tūpato, me whai whakaaro tika noa iho. Mā ngā tikanga tika, ka taea e koe te whakawhiti kōrero me te māia, me te haumaru.

mō.whakamārama: He karere haumaru, maha-ā-reo a Chatforia me te whakamunatanga mutunga-ki-mutunga, te whakamāori ohorere, me ngā karanga oro/ataata. He māmā tā mātou whāinga: hei āwhina i te hunga kia hono—haumaru, tūmataiti, ā, puta noa i ngā reo.
mō.valuesTitle: Ngā mea e whakanuia ana e mātou

values.access: Tūwhera mō te katoa: Whakamāori aunoa i ngā reo neke atu i te 100.

mō.howTitle: Me pēhea te mahi a Chatforia
mō.howDescription: Ka whakamunatia ngā karere i runga i tō pūrere i mua i tō rātou wehenga atu. Kua hoahoatia te whakamāori, ngā tārua, me te whakakotahitanga pūrere kia whakaiti i ngā mea ka kitea e ā mātou tūmau.

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: Mō ngā pātai pāpāho, whakapā mai ki a mātou i
press.boilerplateBody: Ko Chatforia he taupānga karere e aro nui ana ki te tūmataitinga, ā, ka māmā ake te kōrero whakawhiti-ā-reo. Ka whakamunatia ngā karere mai i te tīmatanga ki te mutunga i te taunoa, ā, ka tautoko te whakamāoritanga ā-roto i ngā reo neke atu i te 100 i te wā tūturu. Ka taea e ngā kaiwhakamahi te whakahohe i ngā karere ka ngaro, te pupuri i ngā rīpeka pānui hei kōwhiringa, me te whakakōtui i ngā pūrere. E wātea ana i runga i te iOS, Android, me te paetukutuku.
press.assetsSubtitle: Ngā tohu āhua, ngā whakaahua mata, me ngā whakaahua hua.
press.scanTip: Kei te papamahi? Tātarihia mā tō waea hei tiki i te taupānga.

careers.title: Ngā Tūranga Mahi
careers.intro: He rōpū kaihanga iti mātou e hanga ana i a Chatforia — he karere tūmataiti ā-ao e whakarewahia ana ki te paetukutuku, iOS, me Android. Mēnā he mea nui ki a koe te tūmataitinga, te whakamunatanga, me ngā wheako kaiwhakamahi whakamīharo, ka tino koa mātou ki te rongo mai i a koe.
careers.openRoles: Ngā tūranga kaihanga e wātea ana: Kaihanga Pūnaha-whānui (Lead Full-stack Engineer), Kaihanga Pūnaha Tūmau (Backend Engineer) (Node.js), Kaihanga Pūnaha Mata-mua/ Inihiniara Tukutuku (React), Inihiniara Pūkoro (iOS), Inihiniara Pūkoro (Android), DevOps/SRE, Inihiniara Haumarutanga & Whakamunatanga, Inihiniara Whakawhitiwhiti (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Me pēhea te tono: Whakamahia te pātene i raro nei ki te īmēra i tō CV me ō hononga.
careers.whyNow: He aha ai koe e hono ai ināianei?
careers.whyBullets:
• Āwhina ki te hanga i te tūāpapa o tētahi karere ā-ao hou.
• Tuku whakahou e whakamahia ana puta noa i te paetukutuku, iOS, me Android.
• Mahi tika ki te kaiwhakarewa mō te hanganga me te aronga hua.
• Noho rangatira ki ngā wāhanga whai pānga nui o te pūnaha: karere, reo, ataata, whakamunatanga, whakawhitiwhiti, AI.
• Hono mai i te tīmatanga — i mua i te pikinga ake o te hunga kaiwhakamahi.

advertise.title: Whakatairanga me Chatforia
advertise.description: Tāpaea ki ngā kaiwhakamahi karere kua ū ki te whakamahi, mā ngā whakanoho ātaahua, haumaru hoki mō tō waitohu. Ka tukuna e mātou ngā pānui whakatairanga ki ngā wāhi tino kitea, ngā tautoko pūtea, me ngā whakatairanga ā-roto. Kāore ngā ohaurunga taumata-nui e kite i ngā pānui.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Ka tukuna hoki e mātou ētahi rawa pānui mā Google AdSense. Ka taea e koe te arotahi ki Chatforia mā te tuakiri kaiwhakaputa {{pub Id}}, rānei whakamahia te puka i raro nei mō ngā tautoko tūturu.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Ka tukuna hoki e mātou ētahi rawa mā Google AdSense. Kei te wātea ngā tautoko tūturu—whakamahia te puka i raro nei.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Kei te whakaoti mātou i tā mātou rārangi pānui. Kōrero mai mō tō kaupapa, ā, ka tūtohu mātou i ngā tūnga.

intro.body: E whakamārama ana tēnei Kaupapahere Tūmataiti me pēhea a Chatforia ("mātou") e kohi, e whakamahi, e tiri ana i ngā pārongo i a koe e whakamahi ana i ā mātou taupānga me ā mātou ratonga. Ka hoahoa mātou i a Chatforia kia whakaiti i ngā raraunga ka taea e mātou te uru atu.

ngāPārongoKaKohiaEMātou.taitara: Ngā pārongo e kohia ana e mātou
ngāPārongoKaKohiaEMātou.pūkete: Ngā pārongo pūkete (hei tauira, īmēra/waea) hei waihanga, hei whakamarumaru i tō pūkete.
ngāPārongoKaKohiaEMātou.kua whakamunatia: Ko ngā ihirangi kua whakamunatia (ngā karere/waea) he whakamunatanga mutunga-ki-te-mutunga; kāore mātou e taea te pānui.
ngāPārongoKaKohiaEMātou.tātari: Ngā tātari/whakamahinga pērā i ngā rangitaki pakaru, te momo pūrere, rānei tātaritanga matotoru hei whakapai ake i te mahinga.

sms.title: Ngā nama waea pūkoro me ngā SMS
sms.body: Mēnā ka whiriwhiri koe ki te tuku nama waea pūkoro, ka whakamahia e mātou hei whakahohe āhuatanga pērā i te whakamana pūkete, ngā whakamōhiotanga takiuru, me te tuku karere ā-kaiwhakamahi mā SMS i ngā wā e tautokohia ana. Ka taea e mātou te tuku karere SMS whakawhitinga e pā ana ki tō pūkete me ō mahi i runga i Chatforia. Ka taea e koe te whakakore i te whiwhi karere SMS i ngā wā katoa wā mā te whakahoki mai i tētahi kupu matua whakakore tautokona (pērā i te "STOP") rānei mā te whakarerekē i ōu manakohanga pānui i roto i te taupānga. Kāore mātou e hoko i tō nama waea, e whakamahi rānei mō ngā hokohoko kāore e hāngai ana.
sms.enterRecipient: Tuhia he ingoa, he nama rānei
sms.addRecipient: Tāpiri i tētahi kaiwhiwhi i runga ake nei kia tīmata…

howWeUse.title: Me pēhea mātou e whakamahi ai i ngā pārongo
howWeUse.provide: Whakarato me te whakarite haumaru i te ratonga (whakamanatanga, kitenga īmēra pānui/whakamahi hē).
howWeUse.improve: Whakapai ake i ngā āhuatanga (kounga whakamāori, pono).

sharing.tinana: Kāore mātou e hoko i ngā raraunga whaiaro. Tērā pea ka tiritiri mātou i ētahi raraunga iti ki ngā kaiwhakahaere (hei tauira, ngā pānui pana, ngā tātaritanga) i raro i ngā kirimana mārō.

mana.tinana: I runga i tō rohe (hei tauira, GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), ka taea e koe te tono kia uru, kia whakatika, kia muku, kia whakakore rānei i ētahi tukanga. Whakapā: privacy@chatforia.com.

rokiroki.taitara: Roanga pupuri raraunga me te haumaru
rokiroki.tinana: Ka pupuri mātou i ngā raraunga e hiahiatia ana hei whakahaere i te ratonga, ā, ka whakamahi i ngā paerewa haumaru o te umanga. Kāore e taea e mātou te wetewete i ngā ihirangi mutunga-ki-mutunga.

tamaiti.body: Kāore a Chatforia e aro ki ngā tamariki i raro i te 13 tau (rānei, pēnei i ngā whakaritenga o tō ture ā-rohe).

changes.title: Ngā Panonitanga
changes.body: Ka whakaputahia e mātou ngā whakahōu ki konei, ā, ka whakahōu i te rā "I whakahōutia whakamutunga".

contact.title: Whakapā
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Mā te whakamahi i a Chatforia ka whakaae koe ki ēnei Tikanga. Mēnā kāore koe e whakaae, kaua e whakamahi i te ratonga.

pūkete.itemAccurateInfo: Tukua ngā pārongo tika, ā, kia tiakina ngā tohu uru.
pūkete.itemHaepapa: Ko koe te haepapa mō ngā mahi i runga i tō pūkete.

whakamahingaTika.itemKauaEWhakaparahako: Kaua e whai ihirangi hē, whakaparahako, whai hara rānei; kaua e tukuna karere pākahukahu (spam) me ngā mahi aunoa whakaparahako.
whakamahingaTika.itemWhakatā: Ka taea e mātou te whakatā, te whakamutu rānei mō ngā hē.

sms.title: Whakawhitiwhiti kōrero SMS
sms.body: Mēnā ka tuku koe i tētahi nama waea pūkoro, ka whakaae koe ka taea e Chatforia te tuku karere SMS ki a koe e pā ana ki tō pūkete me tō whakamahi i te ratonga, pērā i ngā whakamōhiotanga takiuru, ngā whakamōhiotanga haumaru, me ngā karere e pā ana ki ngā kōrero i tīmataia, i whai wāhi rānei e koe. Kāore mātou e whakamahi i te SMS mō ngā karere whakatairanga, hokohoko rānei mehemea kāore tō whakaaetanga mārama. Ka taea pea te utu mō ngā karere paerewa me ngā raraunga. Ka taea e koe te wehe atu o ngā karere SMS i ngā wā katoa mā te whakahoki mai i tētahi kupu matua whakakore tautokona (hei tauira, "STOP") rānei mā te whakahou i ō tautuhinga whakamōhiotanga i roto i te taupānga.

yourContent.title: Tō ihirangi
yourContent.body: Kei a koe tonu ngā mana mō tō ihirangi. Ka tuku mai koe ki a mātou i ngā mana e hiahiatia ana kia whakahaere i te ratonga (hei tauira, te whakatere, te rokiroki, te whakamāori).

disclaimer.title: Ngā whakakahore haepapa & kawenga
disclaimer.body: Ka whakaratohia te ratonga "pērā tonu" me te kore whakamana. I runga i te taumata katoa e whakaaetia ana e te ture, kāore a Chatforia e kawenga mō ngā whara taha-rua, whara hua rānei.

changes.title: Ngā panonitanga
changes.body: Ka taea e mātou te whakahou i ēnei tikanga; mā te whakamahi tonu i muri i ngā panoni ka tohu i tō whakaae.

contact.title: Whakapā
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

refund.title: Kaupapahere Utu Anō
refund.intro: I Chatforia, e whakapau kaha ana mātou ki te whakarato ratonga kounga teitei ki ngā kaiwhakamahi katoa. E whakamārama ana tēnei Kaupapahere Utu Anō i ngā wā ka tukuna pea ngā utu anō.

ngā ohaurunga.tinana: Ka utua ngā ohaurunga i mua, ā, ka whakahouhia ia wā. Ka taea e koe te whakakore i ngā wā katoa mā ngā tautuhinga pūkete, mā te papanga rānei i whakamahia hei hoko.

whaimana.taitara: Te Whaimana mō te Utu Anō
whaimana.tinana: Ka taea te tuku utu anō mō ngā utu tārua, ngā hapa nama, ngā raruraru hangarau rānei i aukati i te uru ki ngā āhuatanga utua. Ka arotakehia ia tono, ia take.

kāoreEutuAnō.tinana: I te nuinga o te wā, kāore mātou e tuku utu anō mō te wā kāore i whakamahia, ngā wā o te ohaurunga kāore i oti, te kore whakakore rānei i mua i te whakahou."

tahaTuatoru.taitara: Ngā Hokonga a te Rōpū Tuatoru
tahaTuatoru.tinana: Mēnā i hokona mā ngā papanga tuatoru pērā i te Apple App Store, me tono ngā whakahoki pūtea tika mā aua papanga.

whakapā.tinana: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 8280 1, USA

doNotSell.title: Kaua e Hokona, e Tiritiri rānei i ōku Mōhiohio Whaiaro
doNotSell.body: Kāore a Chatforia e hoko i ngā mōhiohio whaiaro. Ka taea tonu e ngā kainoho o California te tuku tono i raro i te CPRA mā te pātene kei raro nei.

cookies.tinana: Ka whakamahi a Chatforia i ngā pūka iti rawa (hei tauira, wāhanga, haumaru). Kāore mātou e whakamahi i ngā pūka pānui a ētahi atu. Whakahaerehia ngā pūka mā ngā tautuhinga o tō pūtirotiro.

premiumGuard.requiresPremium: Me whai mahere Premium tēnei āhuatanga.

whatWeSend.title: Ngā mea e tukuna ana e mātou
whatWeSend.body: Ka tukuna e Chatforia ngā SMS e pā ana ki te pūkete me ngā kōrero anake ki ngā nama waea kua whakaratoa, kua whakaaetia e te kaiwhakamahi. Ko ngā karere noa ko ngā waehere takiuru/whakamana, ngā whakamōhiotanga tuku karere, ngā pānui haumaru, me ngā whakahou pūkete whakawhitinga.

optIn.title: Me pēhea te haina a ngā kaiwhakamahi
optIn.body: Ka haina ngā kaiwhakamahi mā te whakauru i tō rātou nama waea i te wā rēhitatanga me te tohu i te pouaka whakaae SMS kei te whārangi rēhitatanga, kei te puka tono rānei
